_comment: Thrift config. Copy to ~/.claude/.thrift/config.json and edit, or run /thrift:setup. Any key can also be set via env THRIFT_<KEY> (e.g. THRIFT_ROTATE_WARN=400000). Delete a key to use the built-in default.
_context_window_note: Defaults are tuned for a 200k window. On the 1M-context variant, multiply the rotate_* tiers up (e.g. warn 600000 / deliberate 800000 / ceiling 950000).
_cache_cold_note: Lever 2b: a turn that writes >= cache_cold_min tokens to cache AND writes more than it reads is a full-context re-prefill after the ~5-min cache TTL lapsed (billed at 1.25x, not the 0.1x cached read). That cold return is the cheapest moment to rotate, so the note escalates one tier. Raise this to make the signal less sensitive; it never fires below rotate_warn.
_remem_note: Remem (github: darks0l/remem) is an OPTIONAL memory/recall module. It is OFF by default; /thrift:setup asks whether to opt in. Turning it on requires Remem installed separately.
